endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Insights/components/{resourceName}/DefaultWorkItemConfig
endpoints.description: Gets default work item configurations that exist for the application
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Insights/components/{resourceName}/WorkItemConfigs
endpoints.description: Gets the list work item configurations that exist for the application
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Insights/components/{resourceName}/WorkItemConfigs
endpoints.description: Create a work item configuration for an Application Insights component.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Insights/components/{resourceName}/WorkItemConfigs/{workItemConfigId}
endpoints.description: Gets specified work item configuration for an Application Insights component.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{WORKITEMCONFIGID}} with a real workitemconfigid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Insights/components/{resourceName}/WorkItemConfigs/{workItemConfigId}
endpoints.description: Delete a work item configuration of an Application Insights component.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{WORKITEMCONFIGID}} with a real workitemconfigid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PATCH /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Insights/components/{resourceName}/WorkItemConfigs/{workItemConfigId}
endpoints.description: Update a work item configuration for an Application Insights component.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{WORKITEMCONFIGID}} with a real workitemconfigid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
